entry.title: Review: Taco Bell - Mini Taco Salad
entry.summary:
Taco Bell's Mini Taco Salad is part of the chain's Luxe Value Menu. It features seasoned beef, Creamy Chipotle Sauce, shredded cheddar cheese, shredded iceberg lettuce, diced tomatoes, and refried beans in a crispy tortilla bowl.
It cost me $2.79. The salad came in a paper clamshell box. The salad was small and fit neatly in my hand. I stifled the impulse to take a bite as the shell seemed fairly brittle and likely to break, spilling its contents. The shell is made from the same flour-corn tortilla as a Mexican Pizza. It had a lighter, more delicate crunch than the chain's corn tortilla shells.
There was more Creamy Chipotle Sauce on top than was necessary, and I recommend mixing it in before you dig in. It has quite a potent smoky, spicy profile on its own. For a salad, even a mini one, there was a laughable amount of lettuce. There was less lettuce than you'd find in a Taco Bell taco. Along with the tomatoes, it was pretty fresh, though.
The seasoned beef was also a light touch but added a welcome, seasoned meatiness. The most plentiful ingredient was actually the beans, which lined the bottom of the shell. They had a nice, seasoned, savory flavor and provided some chip-and-bean-dip action at the end.
Overall, I liked Taco Bell's Mini Taco Salad a good deal. If you've been missing the chain's tostada, you can consider this a return of it, only with more variety and flavor. Nutritional Info - Taco Bell Mini Taco Salad Calories - 280 Fat - 15g (Saturated Fat - 4g) Sodium - 490mg Carbs - 27g (Sugar - 2g) Protein - 9g Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Krispy Kreme's 2026 Easter Donuts Arrive
entry.summary:
Krispy Kreme adopts an Easter basket theme for this year's 2026 Easter donuts. The new Easter Basket Collection includes:
- Easter Egg Basket Donut - An Original Glazed donut piped with vanilla-flavored buttercreme, dipped in decorative green sugar, and topped with an Easter egg sugar piece. - Strawberry Egg Donut - A shell donut filled with white Kreme, dipped in pink strawberry-flavored icing, and decorated with yellow and blue vanilla-flavored icing drizzles. - Baby Chick Donut - An Original Glazed donut dipped in yellow vanilla-flavored icing and decorated with a baby chick sugar piece. The seasonal donuts are available now for a limited time at participating locations across the US. They can also be found at select retailers in a six-pack. Photo via Krispy Kreme. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: KFC Offers 10 Wings for $10 Deal
entry.summary:
Amid March Madness, KFC is offering a deal where you can get either 10 Hot & Spicy wings for $10 or 20 wings for $20 through the KFC mobile app or website for a limited time.
KFC's Hot & Spicy Wings are marinated and double-breaded with its Extra Crispy breading. Prices vary, but six wings are normally $8.49 near me in Los Angeles, while 20 wings are $24.99. Other national deals at KFC right now include:
$10 Tuesday - 8 pieces of fried chicken (leg and thighs) or 8 tenders for $10 on Tuesdays. $20 Build-A-Bucket - 8 pieces of fried dark meat chicken or 8 tenders, plus 4 individual sides and 4 buttermilk biscuits for $20.
Photo via KFC. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: New at Sonic: Strawberry Horchata Cream Slush
entry.summary:
Sonic introduces the new Strawberry Horchata Cream Slush as a limited-time, spring offering for its slush menu.
The new drink features the chain's signature slush blended with vanilla soft serve, cinnamon-spiced horchata syrup, and strawberries. The Strawberry Horchata Cream Slush is only available in a 20-oz size for a suggested price of $3.99 at participating locations nationwide. Photo via Sonic. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Pizza Hut Introduces New Hand-Tossed Pizza Crust and Space Jam Triple Treat Box
entry.summary:
Pizza Hut updates its Hand-Tossed Crust with a new recipe and launches the new Space Jam x Triple Treat Box to celebrate the basketball movie's 30th anniversary (and coinciding with March Madness).
Pizza Hut's new Hand Tossed Crust marks the chain's first recipe update in over a decade. It features a "lighter, airier bite with just the right balance of softness and crisp." It's finished with the chain's Garlic-Parm Hut Blend (you can opt to get it without the seasoning). It's featured in a new $10 large 3-topping pizza deal and in the Space Jam x Triple Treat Box. The new $10 large 3-topping pizza deal ($10.99 here in California) is a limited-time offer at participating locations nationwide, where you can get a large 3-topping pizza on new Hand-Tossed crust, Thin 'N Crispy, or Chicago Tavern Style. It replaces a similar deal that allowed up to five toppings. The Space Jam x Triple Treat Box includes two medium 1-topping pizzas, breadsticks, and Cinnamon Sticks (other desserts are available for an additional charge) in a limited-edition Space Jam-themed box at participating locations. Pricing starts at $21.99 (it's $24.99 near me).
Photos via Pizza Hut. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Crumbl Bakes New Oreo Brookies & Cream Cookie
entry.summary:
Crumbl introduces the new Brookies & Cream Cookie featuring Oreo as part of this week's limited-time lineup from March 23 through March 28, 2026.
Here are the four desserts on this week's rotating menu at Crumbl: - New Brookies & Cream Cookie featuring Oreo (pictured) - A whole Oreo cookie stuffed inside a warm brookie, topped with Oreo cookie pieces. - Dubai Chocolate Brownie - A chilled fudge brownie with a kataifi and pistachio cream filling topped with a layer of milk chocolate and a drizzle of more pistachio cream. - Cake Batter Blondie Cookie - A warm cake batter cookie packed with white drops, rimmed with rainbow sprinkles. - Carrot Cake Cookie - A warm, spiced carrot cake topped with cream cheese frosting and a pecan garnish. Photo via Crumbl. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: New at Taco Bell: Crispy Chicken Crunchwrap Slider and Cantina Chicken Rolled Quesadilla
entry.summary:
Taco Bell adds two new menu items with the launch of the Crispy Chicken Crunchwrap Slider and Cantina Chicken Rolled Quesadilla.
The Crispy Chicken Crunchwrap Slider (pictured) is now available for a limited time and features Crispy Chicken Nuggets, a three-cheese blend, pico de gallo, and either Creamy Chipotle or Jalapeno Honey Mustard sauce, folded in a warm flour tortilla in the same manner as Taco Bell's signature Crunchwrap Supreme, and then grilled. It carries a suggested price of $2.49. The slider is also showcased in a $9 Discovery Luxe Cravings Box, which includes a Crispy Crunchwrap Slider, a Cheesy Gordita Crunch, a Nacho Cheese Doritos Locos Taco, Chips and Nacho Cheese Sauce, and a medium fountain drink. The Cantina Chicken Rolled Quesadilla is a permanent menu item that features a double portion (compared to a Cantina Chicken Quesadilla) of slow-roasted Cantina Chicken, a three-cheese blend, and Creamy Chipotle sauce, rolled up in a warm flour tortilla and grilled. Reduced-fat sour cream and Avocado Verde Salsa are included on the side. The Cantina Chicken Rolled Quesadilla is priced at $6.69 (may vary) and follows last fall's Steak & Poblano Rolled Quesadilla. Photo via Taco Bell. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: New Jalapeno Ranch Club Chicken Sandwich Arrives at Chick-fil-A
entry.summary:
Chick-fil-A launches the new Jalapeno Ranch Club Sandwich as a limited-time spring menu item. It's joined by new Strawberry Hibiscus beverages.
The Jalapeno Ranch Club Chicken Sandwich features a chicken filet (choose from Original, Spicy, or Grilled filets), pepper jack cheese, caramelized onion-flavored candied bacon strips, lettuce, tomato, and pickled jalapenos, served on a new buttermilk ranch bun. A creamy jalapeno ranch sauce is included on the side. Prices may vary, but here in Los Angeles, the Original Jalapeno Ranch Club Sandwich with an Original crispy-fried costs $10.29. The Spicy filet version costs $10.79, while the Grilled version costs $10.99. Strawberry Hibiscus beverages come in four varieties: - Strawberry Hibiscus & Sprite - Sprite mixed with strawberry and hibiscus flavors. - Strawberry Hibiscus Lemonade - A mix of regular or diet lemonade with strawberry and hibiscus flavors. - Strawberry Hibiscus Frosted Lemonade - Regular or diet lemonade mixed with Icedream frozen dairy dessert, plus strawberry and hibiscus flavors. - Strawberry Hibiscus Sunjoy - Lemonade and sweetened iced tea mixed with strawberry and hibiscus flavors. Photo via Chick-fil-A. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Review: Burger King - New "Better" Whopper (2026)
entry.summary:
Burger King's new "Better" Whopper features some slight improvements, including a new bun, new mayo, and a clamshell box instead of a wrapper.
It's normally $7.99 in my area (Los Angeles), but I used the Whopper Wednesday deal to get it for $3.99. As an aside, the pricing at my local Burger King is a bit weird. A Whopper is $7.99, a Double Whopper is $9.19, and a Triple Whopper is $11.69. This means a second patty costs $1.20, while a third costs $2.40. Also, a Whopper Jr. is $4.59, but a Double Whopper Jr. (it's the same thing, only with a second patty) is $7.99(?!). That's $3.40 extra for a second small beef patty.
I ordered the Whopper cut in half with a beef patty that came fresh out of the broiler (it's an option when ordering through the app).
The new bun is the most noticeabl…

entry.title: Starbucks Introduces 2026 Spring Menu
entry.summary:
Starbucks has rolled out its 2026 spring menu, and it features new flavors such as ube and toasted coconut, along with the return of lavender. Here's what you'll find on this year's spring menu:
- New Toasted Coconut Cream Cold Brew - Starbucks Cold Brew with toasted coconut cream-flavored cold foam. - New Toasted Coconut Latte - Starbucks signature espresso, toasted coconut-flavored syrup, and milk. Available hot or iced. Both Toasted Coconut Syrup and Toasted Coconut Cream Cold Foam are permanent menu additions. - New Iced Ube Coconut Macchiato - Toasted Coconut Syrup, milk, and espresso over ice, topped with Ube Coconut Cream Cold Foam and toasted coconut flakes. While it's available, the Ube Coconut Cream Cold Foam can be added to any iced beverage. - A new chai recipe that allows for customization in terms of sweetness and spice levels. It's made with a blend of black tea, warming spices (including cinnamon, clove, cardamom, and ginger), and a hint of honey. Specifically, you can adjust the amount of chai and classic syrup in your chai latte. You can also add flavors and toppings as you like (for an extra charge). The previous chai concentrate was pre-sweetened with sugar, while the new chai concentrate is only lightly sweetened with honey. - New Iced Lavender Cream Chai - Chai concentrate, classic syrup, and milk, served over ice and topped with Lavender Cream Cold Foam. - Lavender Latte -Starbucks Blonde Espresso Roast, milk, and lavender powder. Available hot or iced. - Lavender Creme Frappuccino - Lavender powder blended with vanilla syrup, milk, and ice, topped with whipped cream. - Iced Lavender Cream Matcha - Matcha, classic syrup, and milk, served over ice and topped with Lavender Cream Cold Foam. - New Frog Cake Pop - A ball of vanilla cake mixed with buttercream, dipped in green chocolatey icing, and decorated in a frog design. Starbucks will also be introducing the new Iced Mango Cream Matcha later this spring. Photo via Starbucks. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Jimmy Johns Debuts New Gyros
entry.summary:
Jimmy John's adds new gyros to the menu for a limited time nationwide. The chain's Greek-inspired sandwiches come in two varieties: the Greek Gyro and Chicken Gyro. A new Greek Cucumber Salad is also available as a side.
The Greek Gyro features seasoned gyro meat (a blend of beef and lamb), lettuce, tomato, cucumber, onion, and tzatziki sauce, wrapped in a warm pita. The Chicken Gyro consists of gyro-seasoned chicken, lettuce, tomato, cucumbers, onion, and tzatziki, wrapped in a warm pita The Greek Cucumber Salad is a mix of cucumbers, tzatziki, sliced pickles, and onions Prices vary, but my local Jimmy John's sells both Gyros for $11.69 and charges $4.99 for the Greek Cucumber Salad. Photo via Jimmy John's. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Free Cone Day at Dairy Queen on March 19, 2026
entry.summary:
Dairy Queen will be celebrating its annual Free Cone Day on Thursday, March 19, 2026, at participating locations nationwide.
According to a survey conducted by Dairy Queen, "92% of Americans say a free DQ cone would make them happy." The chain gave away 5 million free cones last year. During the promotion, you can snag a free small vanilla cone at participating non-mall locations in the US, while supplies last. Mall locations will require a purchase. Photo via Dairy Queen. Read more at Brand Eating!
